---
title: "The Rev. Charles Sloggett"
---

## The Rev. Charles Sloggett

**Dates:** (1819-1903)

### Description

Vicar of St. Bartholomew Hyde, Winchester (1869-1878) and then of Chiddingfold, Surrey, 1878-1899.

### Biography

<i>Alumni Cantabrigienses</i>

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 29th 1877 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
